segments.text: In that lock-down, he grabbed the banana, so it didn't connect!
segments.original_text: ここでの固めでバナナ拾ってしまったため点としませんでしたね

segments.text: He timed the forward tilt on the landing.
segments.original_text: 着地に横強を合わせて

segments.text: Coming back from the side with up B leaves almost no invincibility.
segments.original_text: ここは上必殺技で横から返ってくることで無敵がほとんどない

segments.text: But then the up tilt caught him!

full_text: In that lock-down, he grabbed the banana, so it didn't connect! He timed the forward tilt on the landing. Coming back from the side with up B leaves almost no invincibility. But then the up tilt caught him!
